title: Bears are Losing Control Over JB Hunt (JBHT), Here's Why It's a 'Buy' Now
text: JB Hunt (JBHT) appears to have found support after losing some value lately, as indicated by the formation of a hammer chart. In addition to this technical chart pattern, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher enhances the stock's potential for a turnaround in the near term.

title: J.B. Hunt: A Good Long-Term Bet
text: Good growth prospects in the short and long term on the back of good demand in the intermodal segment. The company is building capacity to meet growing demand in the intermodal segment and undertaking joint initiatives with BNSF.

title: J.B. Hunt, University of Arkansas Collaboration Focuses on Future of Supply Chain
text: LOWELL, Ark.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc., one of the largest supply chain solutions providers in North America, and the University of Arkansas announced the Sam M. Walton College of Business program for studying supply chain, ranked number one by Gartner, has officially been renamed the J.B. Hunt Transport Department of Supply Chain Management. title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. Announces Participation in the Deutsche Bank 2022 Transportation Conference
text: LOWELL, Ark.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: JBHT) Executive Vice President and President of Intermodal Darren Field, Executive Vice President of Highway Services Eric McGee, and Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice President of Finance John Kuhlow will address the Deutsche Bank 2022 Transportation Conference at 11:00 a.m. eastern time on Tuesday, August 16, 2022.
